scripts.build:wavedash: vite build --mode wavedash --base=./ --outDir=wavedash-dist && wavedash build push
scripts.build:itch: vite build --mode itch --base=./ && cd dist && tar -a -cf ../volt-flicker-itch.zip * && cd .. && move volt-flicker-itch.zip dist\
scripts.build:glitch: vite build --mode glitch --base=./ && cd dist && tar -a -cf ../volt-flicker-glitch.zip * && cd .. && move volt-flicker-glitch.zip dist\
scripts.build:playgama: vite build --mode playgama --base=./ && cd dist && tar -a -cf ../volt-flicker-playgama.zip * && cd .. && move volt-flicker-playgama.zip dist\
scripts.build:gamepix: vite build --mode gamepix --base=./ && cd dist && tar -a -cf ../volt-flicker-gamepix.zip * && cd .. && move volt-flicker-gamepix.zip dist\
scripts.build:gamemonetize: vite build --mode gamemonetize --base=./ && cd dist && tar -a -cf ../volt-flicker-gamemonetize.zip * && cd .. && move volt-flicker-gamemonetize.zip dist\
scripts.build:yandex: vite build --mode yandex --base=./ && cd dist && tar -a -cf ../volt-flicker-yandex.zip * && cd .. && move volt-flicker-yandex.zip dist\
